slos.name: availability >= 99%
slos.description: At least 99% of requests must succeed (cache hits + provider successes).

slos.name: error_rate <= 5%
slos.description: Hard errors (static fallbacks) must stay below 5%.

slos.name: p95_latency <= 2500ms
slos.description: P95 end-to-end latency must be below 2.5 seconds.

slos.name: p99_latency <= 5000ms
slos.description: P99 end-to-end latency must be below 5 seconds.

slos.name: cache_hit_rate >= 20%
slos.description: Cache must serve at least 20% of total requests.

slos.name: recovery_time <= 3000ms
slos.description: Circuit breaker recovery (OPEN→CLOSED) should take < 3 s (skipped if no recovery occurred).
